description: Account for Av and Elul 1494, and Tishri 1495 sel. ca. 1183. A double leaf, taken from the notebook of Judge Shemuel b. Saadya, this document contains two accounts of revenue from rent, for the period Av 1494-Tishri 1495 sel., in which Elul 1494 appears twice, each time with different items. Each list of revenues is followed by one of expenditures for the same period. The first list of revenues includes 26 items, totaling 373.5 dirhams, and the second 20 items, totaling 367.5 dirhams. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 343 #87)
tags: 12th c, communal, qodesh, Shemuel b. Saadya, waqf, account
description_he: חשבון לאב, אלול 1494 ותשרי 1495 לשטרות (כ-1183). מפנקס הדיין שמואל בן סעדיה. שתי רשימות הכנסות ורשימות הוצאות לאותה תקופה, סה"כ כ-373–367 דרהם להכנסות.
